site.name: World Cup 2026 - Calendar
site.description: Pick your teams and matches, then download or subscribe to a FIFA World Cup 2026 calendar.

hero.imageAlt: World Cup 2026 stadium with the host nations' flags and the trophy
hero.description: Pick the teams you support, choose the matches you care about, then download or subscribe in one click.

steps.selectToContinue: Select at least one option to continue
steps.step1Description: Choose the national teams you want to follow, or select all.
steps.step1Pending: Pick at least one team to continue
steps.step2Description: Set when kickoffs and calendar events appear for you.
steps.step3Description: Review upcoming games or past results.
steps.step3Pending: Select at least one game to export
steps.step4Description: Subscribe for a live feed — knockout opponents fill in as your teams advance.

matchBrowser.pickTeamsUpcoming: Pick teams above to see upcoming games.
matchBrowser.allUpcoming: All upcoming games you can add to your calendar.
matchBrowser.teamUpcoming: Upcoming games for your teams — knockouts fill in as results come in.
matchBrowser.pickTeamsPast: Pick teams above to see past results.
matchBrowser.allPast: Final scores from across the tournament.

matchList.title: Matches
matchList.emptyDefault: Select one or more teams above to see their matches.
matchList.noUpcomingTeams: No upcoming games for your teams.
matchList.noResultsTeams: No results for your teams yet.
matchList.pickTeamsResults: Pick teams above to see results.

calendarView.tapDayHint: Tap a highlighted day to see scores or select upcoming matches.

timezone.stepHint: Match times and calendar events will use this timezone.
timezone.currentlyOffset: Currently {offset} — kickoff times update as you change this.

calendarActions.googleTitleMobile: Opens Google Calendar app when installed, otherwise the mobile site
calendarActions.googleTitleDesktop: Subscribe in Google Calendar — knockout teams update automatically as results come in
calendarActions.outlookTitleMobile: Opens Outlook app or mobile web to subscribe — syncs to the app after you confirm
calendarActions.outlookTitleDesktop: Subscribe in Outlook on the web — knockout teams update automatically as results come in
calendarActions.appleTitle: Opens Apple Calendar directly on iPhone/iPad to subscribe to the live feed
calendarActions.downloadTitle: Download a one-time snapshot of your selected matches
calendarActions.subscribeAllHint: Your subscription includes all upcoming games. Download .ics uses your checked games only.
calendarActions.subscribeTeamsHint: Your subscription follows the teams you picked through the bracket. Download .ics uses checked games only.
calendarActions.mobileHint: On mobile, links open your calendar app when installed. Google and Outlook may still use the browser to confirm the subscription — it then syncs to the app.
calendarActions.eventsUseTimezone: Events use {timezone}{offset}. Change the timezone in step 2.
calendarActions.help1: Google and Outlook subscribe to a live feed — confirm once in your calendar app. Knockout match names update as teams are confirmed.
calendarActions.help2: On mobile, Google and Outlook links try to open the native app. If nothing happens, use Download .ics or subscribe from a desktop browser — it syncs to your phone afterward.
calendarActions.help3: If Outlook says "Couldn't import calendar", use "Download .ics" and Add calendar → Upload from file (Microsoft's documented fallback).
calendarActions.help4Work: Work or school account? <link></link> instead, or download the .ics and use File → Open & Import.
calendarActions.help5: To use green in Google Calendar: find "FIFA World Cup 2026" in the left sidebar → ⋮ → pick green.

donate.promptTitle: Calendar ready — {count, plural, one {# match} other {# matches}} exported
donate.promptBody: Free to use. If this saved you time, buy me a nice coffee too.
donate.footerBody: This project is free to use. If it saved you time, buy me a nice coffee too.

github.label: Submit issue or contribute on GitHub

footer.disclaimer: Not affiliated with FIFA. Match data for informational use only.

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.metaDescription: Privacy policy for World Cup 2026 Calendar.
privacy.overviewBody: {siteName} ({url}) is a free tool to build a personal FIFA World Cup 2026 match calendar. We do not require an account and do not store your team or match selections on our servers.
privacy.analyticsBody: Google Analytics may collect anonymised usage data (pages visited, device type, country). See
privacy.adsBody: If enabled, Google AdSense may use cookies to serve ads. See
privacy.storageBody: Your timezone preference is saved in your browser only.
privacy.donationsBody: Payments are handled by Stripe. We do not receive or store card details.
privacy.feedsBody: When you export a calendar, match IDs are sent in the URL to generate an ICS file. This is required for the service to work. We do not log which specific matches you select.
privacy.thirdPartiesBody: We use Vercel (hosting), Google Analytics, optional Google AdSense, and Stripe (donations). Each has its own privacy policy.
privacy.contactBody: Questions? Open an issue on the project GitHub repository or contact the site owner.
privacy.disclaimer: Not affiliated with FIFA. Match schedules are for informational use only.
